issue: Customer reported being charged twice for a monthly Pro subscription renewal.
resolution: Verified duplicate transaction in Stripe logs and refunded the second charge within 24 hours.

issue: Unable to log in after resetting password multiple times.
resolution: Found stale authentication session causing login failures. Cleared sessions and guided customer through a successful reset.

issue: Enterprise dashboard exports were timing out for reports larger than 500MB.
resolution: Engineering increased export worker memory allocation and optimized query batching.

issue: Requested refund after forgetting to cancel annual subscription before renewal.
resolution: Approved prorated refund as account usage had been inactive for over 60 days.

issue: Customer disputed unexpected overage charges tied to API usage spikes.
resolution: Reviewed usage analytics with customer and applied a one-time courtesy credit due to unclear quota notifications.

issue: Security team detected unfamiliar login attempts from overseas IP addresses.
resolution: Forced password resets for affected users, revoked active sessions, and enabled mandatory MFA enforcement.

issue: Webhook delivery failures causing downstream automation delays.
resolution: Identified malformed retry headers in webhook payloads and deployed a backend patch.

issue: Customer stated invoices were missing VAT information required for accounting compliance.
resolution: Updated billing profile and regenerated historical invoices with VAT details included.

issue: Enterprise admin requested emergency deletion of a mistakenly shared workspace.
resolution: Ticket escalated to security operations team for compliance verification and permanent deletion handling.

issue: Customer was confused about why SSO features were unavailable on Pro plan.
resolution: Explained SSO availability is limited to Enterprise tier and shared upgrade documentation.

issue: Japanese characters appeared corrupted in exported PDF reports.
resolution: Updated export renderer to support UTF-8 font embedding for multilingual reports.

issue: Past due account remained inaccessible after payment was completed.
resolution: Billing sync job had failed. Manually restored account access after payment confirmation.

issue: Customer accidentally deleted a dashboard and requested recovery.
resolution: Recovered dashboard from nightly backup snapshot and restored permissions.

issue: Scheduled sync jobs failed repeatedly after API version upgrade.
resolution: Engineering team identified deprecated request fields and provided updated SDK migration steps.

issue: Customer could not locate cancellation settings in the updated billing UI.
resolution: Shared step-by-step cancellation instructions and flagged UI discoverability feedback to product team.

issue: Reports API intermittently returned HTTP 500 responses during peak usage.
resolution: Backend autoscaling thresholds were adjusted and error rates normalized after deployment.

issue: Requested refund after accidental upgrade from Free to Pro plan.
resolution: Processed full refund because account activity showed no feature usage after upgrade.

issue: Enterprise customer raised concern about AI assistant exposing another tenant's metadata.
resolution: Escalated to security engineering and isolated autocomplete caching issue affecting shared inference layer.

issue: User reported mobile app notifications not arriving on Android device.
resolution: Resolved issue by resetting stale push notification token on backend.

issue: Customer requested clarification on API rate limits for batch exports.
resolution: Provided detailed documentation and example rate limit headers from production responses.

issue: Unable to receive MFA verification emails after switching domains.
resolution: Customer's domain had strict spam filtering rules blocking verification emails. Recommended allowlisting support domain.

issue: Customer requested audit logs for compliance review covering the last 12 months.
resolution: Generated secure audit export package and shared via encrypted delivery link.

issue: Billing administrator disputed additional seat charges after employee offboarding.
resolution: Confirmed delayed seat sync issue and credited overbilled seats from previous cycle.

issue: Customer unable to access admin panel after enabling mandatory SSO enforcement.
resolution: Escalated to identity engineering team due to SAML assertion mismatch issue.

issue: Requested permanent account deletion under privacy regulations.
resolution: Completed deletion workflow and confirmed data purge after mandatory retention period review.

issue: Customer stated payment page froze during checkout and charged card without upgrading account.
resolution: Verified payment authorization without account provisioning and manually activated subscription.

issue: Customer confused about workspace-level retention settings after policy update.
resolution: Explained new retention controls introduced in Enterprise settings and linked updated documentation.

issue: Enterprise API integrations experienced latency spikes exceeding SLA thresholds.
resolution: Traffic imbalance in EU region was corrected by rerouting workloads and increasing compute allocation.

issue: Customer accidentally uploaded sensitive files to public workspace.
resolution: Removed public links, revoked cached previews, and advised customer on private sharing settings.

issue: Customer reported inconsistent seat counts between billing portal and admin dashboard.
resolution: Resolved synchronization mismatch caused by delayed provisioning jobs and refreshed billing cache.
